top_signals.title: UK Modifies Steel Import Curb After Industry Complaints
top_signals.summary: The UK modified proposed steel safeguards after businesses that use the alloy warned that curbs designed to prop up the country’s ailing steel industry would damage their own production.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Crushers Seek Australian Canola on Trade Pact Hopes
top_signals.summary: Chinese oilseed crushers have made inquiries for fresh cargoes of Australian canola in anticipation of a trade pact that could end a years-long freeze on supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ynyshir: Gareth Ward’s shrine to heavy metal cooking
top_signals.summary: Years ago, a spoonful of Gareth Ward’s blew her mind, now Carys Sharkey makes a pilgrimage to his two Michelin-starred restaurant Ynyshir Many, many years ago, when I had just finished university and was listlessly waiting around to be headhunted, I supported myself by picking up the occasional hospitality odd job. This was normally hours [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kioxia plans new U.S. listing in spring, stock split at home
top_signals.summary: The supplier of NAND storage aims to take advantage of runaway demand for exposure to AI-related semiconductor stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Abracadabra takes emergency action as MIM stablecoin depeg worsens
top_signals.summary: The protocol is raising interest rates across all Cauldrons to encourage debt repayment and reduce supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
top_signals.summary: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
